The task requires creating 3 groups on Slide 2 (0-indexed slide 1), each containing an image and rectangle, with non-zero rotation. The verifier requires minimum 3 groups (verified in verifier.py line 57) and uses a pass threshold of score >= 70 out of 100 points.
